basic_info.headline: Commercial Legal at Anthropic
basic_info.about: In-house counsel leading contracts for Anthropic's safety research and policy teams, as well as enterprise partnerships with major technology companies. My background spans product privacy, ad tech, marketplaces, enterprise SaaS, and content licensing.

experience.title: Head of Safety Research & Policy Agreements
experience.description:
Head of contracting for Anthropic's safety research and policy teams, structuring agreements for AI research and safety collaborations, industry partnerships, and policy research programs.
Head of commercial contracts for Anthropic's enterprise technology customers. 
Building and managing the commercial legal team supporting these verticals.

experience.title: Associate General Counsel, Commercial & Product
experience.description:
Counseled C-level executives on the full spectrum of commercial, corporate, and product matters, worldwide, at a 2000+ employee company with businesses in online marketplaces, content management, e-commerce, social media, and advertising. Build and lead international legal team supporting these areas.

Oversee or directly support the negotiation, drafting, and implementation of outbound (sales) and inbound (vendor) contracts, including strategic partnerships, SaaS agreements, generative AI, marketing agreements, payment processing agreements, co-development agreements, IP licenses, data sharing agreements, and professional services agreements.

Lead private investments, including SAFE rounds and Series financings, and related transactions with private investors.

experience.title: Founding Partner
experience.description:
Aggregate is a men's accessories brand which has been featured in GQ, Mashable, Design Insider, and the California by Design TV Series.  Our signature timepiece was a 2019 finalist for the International Design Excellence Awards (IDEA).

In 2024, I successfully led the sale of Aggregate, transitioning the business to new ownership to ensure its continued growth and success.

experience.title: Commercial Counsel
experience.description: Commercial attorney on a small legal team at a mid-sized ad tech company, owning negotiations for revenue-generating partnerships, strategic deals, and vendor agreements. Helped build out the company's global privacy framework, including GDPR and CCPA compliant data processing agreements and advertising policies. Led cross-functional projects beyond core legal work, partnering closely with business teams across the company.

experience.title: Corporate Counsel
experience.description: Primary legal counsel for ShopStyle Inc., with ownership of the subsidiary's commercial agreements, privacy policies, and partner disputes. Also supported Ebates, Rakuten Advertising, and other Rakuten USA entities on contracts and data privacy compliance.

education.school: University of California, College of the Law, San Francisco (formerly UC Hastings)
education.description:

Best Oral Advocate - Moot Court Award
UC Hastings Intercollegiate Trial Team
